description: A legal document or court order detailing the financial terms, frequency, and duration of spousal support or alimony payments.

issuing_court.instruction: The name of the court, county, or state jurisdiction that issued the support decree.

payor_spouse.instruction: The full name of the spouse ordered to make the maintenance or alimony payments.

payee_spouse.instruction: The full name of the spouse receiving the maintenance or alimony payments.

alimony_amount.instruction: The recurring dollar amount ordered for spousal support.

payment_frequency.instruction: The recurring schedule of the payments, usually Monthly or Bi-Weekly.

termination_condition.instruction: The conditions under which alimony ends, such as a specific end date, remarriage of the recipient, or death.
